Label: Planned Treatment for Period 01
Derivation: Map planned arm to treatment label

Label: Actual Treatment for Period 01
Derivation: Equal to TRT01P unless documented deviation

Label: Safety Population Flag
Derivation: Y if subject received at least one dose of study drug

Label: Efficacy Population Flag
Derivation: Y if ITTFL=Y and at least one post-baseline efficacy assessment

Label: Reported Term for the Adverse Event
Treatment Emergent Analysis Flag
Derivation: Y if AE onset on/after first dose date

Label: Analysis Start Date
Derivation: Impute partial date to first of month/year; convert to numeric date
